backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the HeroSection 'Our Services' button was updated to use a brand-yellow background, with high confidence and a single test ID REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing each component's purpose and notable styling details for the Growth Byte Digital landing page.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including backgrounds, foregrounds, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with the page title 'Growth Byte Digital' and a root div that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that tracks scroll position and composes the full landing page by rendering Navbar, HeroSection, ServicesSection, AboutSection, WhyChooseUsSection, ContactSection, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Two-column section displaying the company logo with a yellow glow, floating stat cards (5x ROI, 200+ clients), and descriptive copy about Growth Byte Digital's approach on a dark navy background.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section with phone, email, and location info links, a WhatsApp CTA button, and a free audit description box — no section heading is rendered.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Full-width footer with the transparent logo, agency tagline, social media icon links, quick navigation links, and contact details including phone number +91 8815610500.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section featuring a background image, logo, agency heading, tagline, a yellow-background 'Our Services' scroll button (bg-brand-yellow with navy text), and animated stat counters.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive fixed navbar with smooth-scroll navigation links, a logo, and a mobile hamburger menu toggle.
Displays a grid of five digital marketing service cards (Social Media, Meta Ads, Google Ads, Lead Generation, Local Marketing) with color-coded icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUsSecti: Renders a 2x2 grid of numbered cards highlighting four competitive advantages: result-driven strategy, affordability, data-based optimization, and local expertise.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and Poppins fonts, defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, and declaring CSS custom properties for the navy-blue/yellow brand theme with dark mode variants.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), oklch-based brand colors (navy, yellow), box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state and feature requests for a React project; currently records one completed feature to style the HeroSection 'Our Services' CTA button with a brand yellow background matching ServicesSection.
